title: kikkar #3603
definition:
1) round
    1a) a round district (environs of the Jordan valley)
    1b) a round loaf (of bread)
    1c) a round weight, talent (of gold, silver, bronze, iron)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) round
    1a) a round district (environs of the Jordan valley)
    1b) a round loaf (of bread)
    1c) a round weight, talent (of gold, silver, bronze, iron)

    NASB:  a round, a round district, a round loaf, a round weight, a talent (a measure of weight or money)
